\begin{Verbatim}[breaklines=true,formatcom=\color{ada_blue}]
hist_revenue <-
  ggplot(USSteamCoEstim, aes(x=revenue)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 4000000, fill = "#00338D") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = label_comma())

hist_production <-
  ggplot(USSteamCoEstim, aes(x=production)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 50000, fill = "#00338D") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = label_comma()) +
  theme(plot.margin = unit(c(0, 1, 0, 0), "cm"))  # top, right, bottom, left

hist_coolDD <-
  ggplot(USSteamCoEstim, aes(x=coolDD)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 50, fill = "#00338D") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = label_comma())

hist_heatDD <-
  ggplot(USSteamCoEstim, aes(x=heatDD)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 100, fill = "#00338D") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = label_comma())

histograms_plot <- grid.arrange(hist_revenue, hist_production, hist_coolDD, hist_heatDD, ncol = 2)
\end{Verbatim}
\endgroup
\par\addvspace{\topsep}

\noindent Figure 5.3 shows the time-series plots for the same dataset.
